title: deschampsia australis var. tenuissima
intro: Deschampsia australis var. tenuissima, also known as slender hair grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is a flowering plant native to New Zealand, traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits. The medicinal properties of Deschampsia australis var. tenuissima include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
